Health_Department_Name: Tulare County Health & Human Services Agency
Program_Description: WIC is designed to help pregnant women, new mothers, and young children eat well and stay healthy.
Target_Population: Low-income pregnant, postpartum, and breastfeeding women; infants and children
Eligibility_Requirements: meet the income guidelines

Health_Department_Name: Tulare County Health & Human Services Agency
Program_Description: The Nurse-Family Partnership provides first-time expectant mothers with a Public Health Nurse to improve pregnancy outcomes, improve infant health and development, and promote economic self-efficacy of families.
Target_Population: First-time expectant mothers
Eligibility_Requirements: Is pregnant with their first child, Is less than 28 weeks pregnant, Meets the income requirements, Is a resident of Tulare County

Health_Department_Name: Tulare County Health & Human Services Agency
Program_Description: The Perinatal Wellness Program assigns a case manager to women demonstrating signs of perinatal mood and anxiety disorders.
Target_Population: Pregnant women or less than one year post delivery
Eligibility_Requirements: Resident of Tulare County, Score of 12 or greater on EPDS or 10 or higher on PHQ-9 or GAD-7

Health_Department_Name: Tulare County Health & Human Services Agency
Program_Description: The Prenatal Substance Exposure Program identifies pregnant women at risk for alcohol or drug exposure.
Target_Population: Pregnant women with substance use risk factors
Eligibility_Requirements: Resident of Tulare County, Positive urine drug screen or admission of substance use during pregnancy

Health_Department_Name: Tulare County Health & Human Services Agency
Program_Description: The High-Risk Infant Program aids with accessing community early intervention services and medical care for infants.
Target_Population: Children from birth to one year of age
Eligibility_Requirements: Resident of Tulare County, Diagnosed failure to thrive or developmental delays

Health_Department_Name: Tulare County Health & Human Services Agency
Program_Description: The Drug Exposed Infant Program offers services for infants exposed to drugs or alcohol during pregnancy.
Target_Population: Infants or children from birth to one year of age
Eligibility_Requirements: Resident of Tulare County, Positive drug screen during prenatal care or at delivery

Health_Department_Name: Tulare County Health & Human Services Agency
Program_Name: Programa de Saúde Materno-Infantil e do Adolescente (MCAH)
Program_Description: O programa de Saúde Materno-Infantil e do Adolescente (MCAH) é um programa de visitas domiciliares que apoia a saúde e o bem-estar de mães, bebês, crianças e jovens.
Target_Population: Mães, bebês, crianças e jovens com necessidades especiais de saúde.
Eligibility_Requirements: Not specified

Health_Department_Name: Tulare County Health & Human Services Agency
Program_Description: O programa Nurse-Family Partnership (Parceria Enfermeira-Família) oferece às gestantes de primeira viagem o acompanhamento de uma enfermeira de saúde pública para melhorar os resultados da gravidez.
Target_Population: Gestantes de primeira viagem residentes do Condado de Tulare.
Eligibility_Requirements: Está grávida do primeiro filho, com menos de 28 semanas de gravidez, atende aos requisitos de renda.

Health_Department_Name: Tulare County Health & Human Services Agency
Program_Description: WIC is designed to help pregnant women, new mothers, and young children eat well and stay healthy.
Target_Population: Low-income pregnant, postpartum, and breastfeeding women; infants and children under five
Eligibility_Requirements: Meet income guidelines; families with children under five who were previously on Healthy Families and now have Medi-Cal may be eligible
Application_Process: Contact WIC toll-free number for location and information

Health_Department_Name: Tulare County Health & Human Services Agency
Program_Description: Medi-Cal provides no- or low-cost health care for individuals, families with children, the elderly, persons with disabilities, foster care, pregnant women, and persons with specific diseases such as tuberculosis, breast cancer, or HIV/AIDS.
Target_Population: Pregnant women and low-income individuals
Eligibility_Requirements: Meeting income thresholds; varies by state expansion status
Application_Process: Applications may be submitted in person, by phone, by fax, or by mail.

Health_Department_Name: Tulare County Health & Human Services Agency
Program_Description: WIC provides nutrition education and benefits to eligible participants.
Target_Population: Low-income pregnant, postpartum, and breastfeeding women; infants and children.
Eligibility_Requirements: Not specified

Health_Department_Name: Tulare County Health & Human Services Agency
Program_Description: Program that provides parent educator home visits.
Target_Population: Expectant parents and families with children from birth through age 3 (or 5 in some cases).
Eligibility_Requirements: Not specified

Health_Department_Name: Tulare County Health & Human Services Agency
Program_Description: WIC is designed to help pregnant, new mothers, and young children eat well and stay healthy.
Target_Population: Low-income pregnant, postpartum, and breastfeeding women; infants and children
Eligibility_Requirements: Must meet income guidelines; families with children under five who were previously in Healthy Families and now have Medi-Cal may qualify.
Application_Process: Contact WIC toll-free number for information and to find the nearest location.

Health_Department_Name: Tulare County Health & Human Services Agency
Program_Description: California WIC transitioned from Enfamil to the Similac brand as of August 1, 2022.
Target_Population: Low-income pregnant, postpartum, and breastfeeding women; infants and children
Eligibility_Requirements: Not specified

Health_Department_Name: Tulare County Health & Human Services Agency
Program_Name: Programa sa Kalusugan ng Ina, Bata, at Kabataan (MCAH)
Program_Description: Ang Maternal, Child, and Adolescent Health (MCAH) ay isang programa sa pagbisita sa bahay na sumusuporta sa kalusugan at kapakanan ng mga ina, sanggol, bata, at kabataan.
Target_Population: Mga ina, sanggol, bata, at kabataan.
Eligibility_Requirements: Not specified

Health_Department_Name: Tulare County Health & Human Services Agency
Program_Description: Ang Nurse-Family Partnership ay nagbibigay sa mga unang beses na nagdadalang-tao ng isang Public Health Nurse upang mapabuti ang mga resulta ng pagbubuntis.
Target_Population: Unang beses na nagdadalang-tao na mga kababaihan.
Eligibility_Requirements: Buntis sa kanilang unang anak, wala pang 28 linggong buntis, nakakatugon sa mga kinakailangan sa kita, residente ng Tulare County.

Health_Department_Name: Tulare County Health & Human Services Agency
Program_Description: El programa WIC está diseñado para ayudar a las mujeres embarazadas, las madres primerizas y los niños pequeños a alimentarse bien y mantenerse sanos.
Target_Population: Low-income pregnant, postpartum, and breastfeeding women; infants and children
Eligibility_Requirements: cumple con los requisitos de ingresos

Health_Department_Name: Tulare County Health & Human Services Agency
Program_Name: Programa de Salud Materna, Infantil y Adolescente (MCAH)
Program_Description: El programa de Salud Materna, Infantil y Adolescente (MCAH) es un programa de visitas domiciliarias que apoya la salud y el bienestar de madres, bebés, niños y jóvenes.
Target_Population: Madres, bebés, niños y jóvenes con necesidades especiales de atención médica.
Eligibility_Requirements: Residencia en el condado de Tulare.

Health_Department_Name: Tulare County Health & Human Services Agency
Program_Description: El Programa de Bienestar Perinatal asignará un gestor de casos a toda mujer que presente signos o síntomas de trastornos del estado de ánimo y ansiedad perinatales.
Target_Population: Mujeres embarazadas o con menos de un año de posparto.
Eligibility_Requirements: Residencia en el condado de Tulare y puntuaciones específicas en herramientas de detección.

Health_Department_Name: Tulare County Health & Human Services Agency
Program_Name: Programa de colaboración entre enfermeras y familias (NFP)
Program_Description: El programa Nurse-Family Partnership brinda a las mujeres primerizas el apoyo de una enfermera de salud pública para mejorar los resultados del embarazo.
Target_Population: Mujeres primerizas embarazadas.
Eligibility_Requirements: Residencia en el condado de Tulare, primer embarazo y menos de 28 semanas de embarazo.

Health_Department_Name: Tulare County Health & Human Services Agency
Program_Name: Programa para bebés expuestos a drogas
Program_Description: El Programa para Bebés Expuestos a Drogas ofrece servicios para bebés que estuvieron expuestos a drogas o alcohol durante el embarazo.
Target_Population: Bebés desde el nacimiento hasta el año de edad expuestos a drogas o alcohol.
Eligibility_Requirements: Residencia en el condado de Tulare y factores de riesgo específicos.

Health_Department_Name: Tulare County Health & Human Services Agency
Program_Name: Programa de Nutrição Suplementar para Mulheres, Bebês e Crianças (WIC)
Program_Description: O programa WIC foi criado para ajudar gestantes, mães recentes e crianças pequenas a se alimentarem bem e manterem-se saudáveis.
Target_Population: Low-income pregnant, postpartum, and breastfeeding women; infants and children
Eligibility_Requirements: Atende aos critérios de renda

Target_Population: Low-income pregnant, postpartum, and breastfeeding women; infants and children under five
